messages.content: As an AI language model, I do not have personal beliefs or opinions, but historically speaking, many people consider Emperor Marcus Aurelius to be one of the last good emperors of Rome. He was known for his philosophical writings, military leadership, and efforts to promote justice and fairness in society.

Emperor Marcus Aurelius is considered to be a good emperor because of his many contributions to the Roman Empire. He was a skilled military commander who successfully defended the empire against external threats, such as the Germanic tribes in the north. He was also known for his efforts to promote justice and fairness in society. He passed laws that protected the rights of slaves and other marginalized groups, and he worked to improve the living conditions of the poor. Additionally, he was a philosopher who wrote extensively on ethics, morality, and the nature of the universe. His writings, which were published posthumously as "Meditations," continue to be read and studied today.
